rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate identically (6/10) and cite the same strengths and concerns — large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems, technical leadership, multi-language proficiency as strengths; lack of C++, no cloud architecture, and not matching preferred qualifications as concerns. The only differences are trivial rewordings ('No explicit experience with cloud architecture' vs 'No direct experience in cloud architecture', reordered phrasing of the distributed-systems strength). Nothing keys off the location change from various international cities to United States.
